ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-04-2026 Off Calendar

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar Apr-29-2026 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Damon Carter; Dept. 505 - Matter Not Reported

Plaintiff Sohn Legal Group, P.C. appearing represented by David Sohn, Esq. via zoom.
Defendant Chang Ho Ahn not appearing.

Mr. Sohn represented to the court that this matter has settled.

This matter goes off calendar.

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar Apr-01-2026 Continued To Apr-29-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being set for hearing on Plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Dept. 505; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk N Webb; Not Reported.

Plaintiff Sohn Leagal Group PC is represented by David D Sohn Esq.
Defendant Chang Ho Ahn An is not present.
Defendant Young An is present in pro per.

The court continues this matter to April 29, 2026 at 9:00 am in Department 505 to allow the parties to continue settlement talks.
